scope: single-seed one-fixed-state 1024-step memorization test of the qualified powers-of-two readout parameterization; unchanged model function, optimizer, loss, path and capacity; no later Gate

decision_rule.pass: freeze one separately versioned 16-fixed-state scaled-readout memorization test before resampled time or production integration
decision_rule.fail: remove the readout reparameterization and return to H1a representation analysis without more scales, steps or seeds
decision_rule.boundary: This one-state test cannot qualify H1a, initialize production training, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
